descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Nanaimo Clippers 7-3 in Game 3 of B.C. Junior Hockey League semi-final playoff series.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Nanaimo Clippers 7-3 on February 27, 1987 in Game 3 of their best-of-seven B.C. Junior Hockey League semi-final playoff series at Civic Arena. The Coastal Division regular-season champions extended their series lead to 3-0 with a strong third-period performance after Nanaimo held a 3-2 lead going into the period. Goals by Rob Clarke, Jason Phillips, Dave Tomlinson, Mike McCormick, and Dean Rutledge sealed the victory before 1,415 fans.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Withstand Nanaimo Pressure, Win Game 3
